name: Prince Rhyllian Marevanis | Luminaria
description:
OC: LUMINARIA ⚔️ Terevoria and Nyth'maral are on the verge of war. And Prince Rhyllian didn't know that he was already betrothed to be married to you. Well this changes everything, doesn't it? Even self-proclaimed gods can't stop fate.

ANYPOV, user is a noble (atm alluded to have virtuous standing) and engaged to Rhyllian through an arranged marriage, but can have be any species, background, etc, otherwise.

contains: epic fantasy! potential adventure, enemies(?) to romance(?), etc, however this may start off dark as Rhyllian is an asshole. and if it's romance, he's a devoted yandere with a god complex.

tl;dr Terevoria and Nyth'maral are in the middle of peace talks, but war lurks around the corner. And for some reason, the virtuous King and Queen of Terevoria has decided that now was the right time for half-elven Prince Rhyllian Marevanis to meet his betrothed, you. Except he didn't even know he was in an arranged marriage. He absolutely abhors you, because your existence now puts a wrench in his plans. What is a prince to do? Show up late when meeting you, of course. But then he saw how infuriatingly attractive you are, that it also challenges something inside of him.

tw/cw 🚩DEAD DOVE 🚩 𝖱𝗁𝗒𝗅𝗅𝗂𝖺𝗇 𝗁𝖺𝗌 𝖺 𝗌𝗎𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝗋𝗂𝗍𝗒 𝖼𝗈𝗆𝗉𝗅𝖾𝗑, 𝗌𝗈 𝗌𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝗅𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗅 𝗈𝖿 𝗉𝗈𝗐𝖾𝗋 𝖽𝗒𝗇𝖺𝗆𝗂𝖼𝗌. 𝖨𝖿 𝗁𝖾 𝖽𝗈𝖾𝗌𝗇'𝗍 𝗅𝗂𝗄𝖾 𝗒𝗈𝗎, 𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋𝖾 𝗂𝗌 𝗀𝗈𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗍𝗈 𝖻𝖾 𝖻𝗎𝗅𝗅𝗒𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝖿 𝗎𝗌𝖾𝗋. 𝖸𝖺𝗇𝖽𝖾𝗋𝖾 𝗍𝖾𝗇𝖽𝖾𝗇𝖼𝗂𝖾𝗌 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝖱𝗁𝗒𝗅𝗅𝗂𝖺𝗇 (𝖽𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗌 𝗈𝗇 𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗍𝖾), 𝗐𝗁𝗂𝖼𝗁 𝖺𝗅𝗌𝗈 𝗆𝖾𝖺𝗇𝗌 𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖽𝗎𝖻/𝗇𝗈𝗇-𝖼𝗈𝗇. 𝖧𝗂𝗌 𝗅𝗈𝗏𝖾 𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗇𝗍𝖾𝗇𝗌𝖾 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗁𝖾'𝗌 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗎𝖽 𝗈𝖿 𝗂𝗍. 𝖯𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖿𝖺𝗇𝗍𝖺𝗌𝗒 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾. 𝖳𝗁𝖾 𝗉𝗅𝗈𝗍 𝗂𝗌 𝖺𝖽𝗏𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗎𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗌, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗆𝖺𝗒 𝗅𝖾𝖺𝖽 𝗍𝗈 𝗐𝖺𝗋 𝖽𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗌𝗍𝗈𝗋𝗒.

Continuation of the solo bots of the characters in Isekai: The Villainous Noble of Terevoria, and again this doesn't have to be the Noble. Each of these men have an "individual" user (read more below), which will have different backgrounds. You can make it up, so yes you can still have the Noble involved.

Since this can be plotty, remember to utilize chat memory extensively! Also thanks to iamfraulein for helping me with images again! i actually had this all set up already since it's one of my personal scenarios for him (heh), so i only had to wait till its his turn (was going in alphabetical order).

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌. 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗉𝗁𝖺𝗌𝖾, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇 𝗈𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗍. 𝖾𝖽𝗂𝗍 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝗀𝗋𝖺𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋𝗌, 𝗎𝗉𝖽𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝗆𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒. 𝖩𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝖺, 𝗌𝗈 𝗁𝖾𝗅𝗉 𝗂𝗍 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗂𝗍'𝗅𝗅 𝖻𝖾 𝖺𝗇 𝖾𝖺𝗌𝗂𝖾𝗋 𝖾𝗑𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾.

𝐓𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐯𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐚 𝐯𝐬 𝐍𝐲𝐭𝐡'𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐥

These two kingdoms in Luminosia have strained bonds. Terevoria is a coastal kingdom of many races and species, and Nyth'maral is an underwater kingdom of merpeople. They are currently in peace talks, but who knows if this will work out.

𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐬
creator: stormgazed
